sub_mechanisms: M_1: agent message-space partitioned by reflection-group action
M_2: simple-reflection morphism between adjacent chambers
M_3: routing message through Weyl chamber adjacency
M_4: word-length cost preserved across coord
stripped_llm_application: Each agent's message lives in a chamber of a reflection-group-partitioned message-space; messages between agents traverse adjacent chambers via simple-reflection morphisms; the routing path's word length is preserved as a cost signal across multi-agent coordination.
novelty_claim_stripped: Multi-agent LLM coord uses pressure-fields / dynamic networking / hierarchical control - no reflection-group geometric routing.
